header.title: GENERAL TERMS AND WARRANTIES
header.subtitle: REGULATIONS FOR EXECUTION, QUALITY AND LIABILITY.

block1.title: FINANCIAL FRAMEWORK AND OWNERSHIP
block1.validity: Quotations are valid for 30 calendar days. After this period they are subject to recalculation based on current chemical commodity prices.
block1.retention: The applied flooring and incorporated materials remain the property of "GEONYX GROUP" Ltd. until 100% of the outstanding sum has been paid. In the event of non-payment, the Contractor retains the right to dismantle or chemically remove the system.

block2.title: SUBSTRATE AND LATENT DEFECTS
block2.note: Responsibility for the quality of the concrete substrate rests entirely with the Client.
block2.requirements: Concrete grade minimum C20/25, moisture below 4%, level surface.
block2.exclusion_intro: "GEONYX GROUP" Ltd. bears NO liability for defects arising from:
block2.li1: Absence of waterproofing and appearance of capillary (rising) moisture from the ground.
block2.li2: Structural cracks in the building or foundation settlement.
block2.li3: Hidden oil pockets in the depth of the existing concrete.

block3.title: OPERATIONAL LIMITS
block3.intro: The warranty is valid only when the specified operational standards are observed.
block3.li1: The warranty covers only chemicals and temperatures explicitly described in the Technical Specification.
block3.li2: Damage from falling objects, pallet dragging or unauthorised heavy equipment traffic is not covered under warranty service.

block4.title: INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
block4.body: All formulations (GEONYX® Formulas), process sheets and application methods are trade secrets and intellectual property of "GEONYX GROUP" Ltd. Any attempt at chemical analysis (Reverse Engineering) or copying of the technology will be prosecuted to the full extent of the law.

block5.title: TIMELINES AND FORCE MAJEURE
block5.body: The technological polymerisation time is 24 hours (at 20°C). Entry to the site before this period voids the warranty. Execution timelines are suspended at temperatures below +5°C or air humidity above 80%, to ensure the quality of the reaction.

footer.note: The accepted general terms form an integral part of the Works Contract. To contact the legal department:
